title: マルゼンさんへの気持ち

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While in the cafeteria, I overhear Sakura Chiyono
O explaining herself.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...So that's why this time, I'm going over to
Maruzen's place!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That sounds great! Maruzen lives on her own,
right?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Which brings us to your dilemma—what kind of
gift you should take with you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. It's just as they say, "Manners between
friends is like turf between toes."

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...There's a saying like that?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
In any case, Maruzen is very mature, so perhaps
you could give her something sophisticated.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, but she does have that mischievous side,
too.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
A while back, when she was recommending some
of her favorite music, she handed me a cassette
tape, but I have no way of playing it...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Her favorite music?! I hope she plays me some
music she likes when I visit her!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Personally, I've always thought of Maruzen as
being a really cool and impressive runner!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I hope that someday I'll not only reach
her level, but surpass it as well.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen loves fast things, so maybe we should
think of something along those lines?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
A present that gives a sense of speed... Hmm, I
can't think of anything.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maybe something homemade would be better? I
often make Japanese-style treats.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Then what about some dynamically shaped red bean jelly?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I'm having trouble picturing a "dynamic"
jelly shape...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, what if we shape it like a sports car?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Nice idea! I could make some car-shaped nerikiri
sweets!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's decided. I'll give her some homemade
Japanese sweets.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ah... but Maruzen often talks about desserts with
foreign names, doesn't she?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah, things like tiramisu and nata de coco.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maybe she doesn't actually like Japanese stuff all
that much.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Aww... And it was such a good idea, too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I happen to make eye contact with Sakura
Chiyono O as she brainstorms with her
companions.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um! Excuse me! Do you know what kind of
gifts adults like? Would you be happy if someone
gave you Japanese sweets?
choice_data_list:
As long as thought's been put into it, I'd be
happy with any gift!

It's probably best to pick something in line with
that person's interests.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
A thoughtful gift... Understood! I'll stake
everything on what I'm most confident in—my
Japanese sweets!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You're peerless in how you make Japanese sweets
and how you aspire to be like Maruzen. I'm
certain she'll love your gift.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! Oh, would you mind taste testing
them sometime? It'd be a big help.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: But of course. I absolutely can't wait.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'll help too! Let me know whenever you need a
taste tester!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm so grateful! I'll do my best to make something
the two of you will enjoy too!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I see! Then maybe I should try my hand at some
western-style treats!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure that anything you make will taste truly
delicious, Chiyono O.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you... Um, the things Maruzen mentions
most are tiramisu, nata de coco, and...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: She likes italian food, too, right?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Pasta and such aren't really desserts though...
